mapper.select: SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM image WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM image WHERE category = #{categoryName} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image (title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{photographer}, #{date}, #{url}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE image SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, category, photographer, date, url, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM image WHERE status = 'draft' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE image SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
